languages.text:
{n}Сержант рефлекторно замирает, как и окружающие его солдаты. Вы видите, как он нервно прикусывает губу, впиваясь в вас взглядом. В затянувшейся тишине вам будто слышится тяжелый скрип медленно проворачивающихся мыслей в голове Заркова. Наконец мужчина шумно выдыхает:{/n}
"Обмануть меня вздумали? Хотите повидать Его Светлость? Что ж, это мы устроим. Доставим в лучшем виде!"

traits.locale_text:
{n}Сержант рефлекторно замирает, как и окружающие его солдаты. Вы видите, как он нервно прикусывает губу, впиваясь в вас взглядом. В затянувшейся тишине вам будто слышится тяжелый скрип медленно проворачивающихся мыслей в голове Заркова. Наконец мужчина шумно выдыхает:{/n}
"Обмануть меня вздумали? Хотите повидать Его Светлость? Что ж, это мы устроим. Доставим в лучшем виде!"

languages.text: {n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"
languages.original_text:
{n}Сержант рефлекторно замирает, как и окружающие его солдаты. Вы видите, как он нервно прикусывает губу, впиваясь в вас взглядом. В затянувшейся тишине вам будто слышится тяжелый скрип медленно проворачивающихся мыслей в голове Заркова. Наконец мужчина шумно выдыхает:{/n}
"Обмануть меня вздумали? Хотите повидать Его Светлость? Что ж, это мы устроим. Доставим в лучшем виде!"

traits.locale_text:
{n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n}
"Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

{n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"
"You don't say? Well, we can easily arrange that. We just have to make sure we bring you to His Lordship in the proper fashion!"

{n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n}
"Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

{n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

languages.text: {n}军士本能地僵住了，他手下的士兵也是如此。他咬着嘴唇死死盯着你。在漫长的沉默中，你几乎能听见扎尔科夫脑子里那沉重的思考声。终于，他大声叹了口气：{/n}“想耍我，是吧？想让我带你们去见舰长大人？可以，按规矩来！”
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

traits.locale_text: {n}军士本能地僵住了，他手下的士兵也是如此。他咬着嘴唇死死盯着你。在漫长的沉默中，你几乎能听见扎尔科夫脑子里那沉重的思考声。终于，他大声叹了口气：{/n}“想耍我，是吧？想让我带你们去见舰长大人？可以，按规矩来！”

languages.text: {n}Le sergent s'immobilise instinctivement, et les soldats sous ses ordres l'imitent. Il vous regarde fixement, se mordant la lèvre. Dans le silence qui n'en finit plus, vous entendez presque Zarkov ruminer. Il finit par laisser échapper un profond soupir.{/n} « Vous cherchez à me piéger, c'est ça ? Vous voulez qu'on vous conduise à Sa Seigneurie ? Ça doit pouvoir s'arranger. En bonne et due forme ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sergent s'immobilise instinctivement, et les soldats sous ses ordres l'imitent. Il vous regarde fixement, se mordant la lèvre. Dans le silence qui n'en finit plus, vous entendez presque Zarkov ruminer. Il finit par laisser échapper un profond soupir.{/n} « Vous cherchez à me piéger, c'est ça ? Vous voulez qu'on vous conduise à Sa Seigneurie ? Ça doit pouvoir s'arranger. En bonne et due forme ! »

languages.text: {n}Çavuş içgüdüsel olarak donakalıyor, emrindeki askerler de öyle. Dudağını ısırarak sana bakıyor. Uzayıp giden sessizlikte, Zarkov'un düşüncelerinin kafasında ağır ağır döndüğünü neredeyse duyabiliyorsun. Sonunda derin bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Beni kandırmaya çalışıyorsunuz, öyle mi? Lord Hazretleri'ne götürülmek mi istiyorsunuz? Olur. Usulüne uygun olarak!"
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Çavuş içgüdüsel olarak donakalıyor, emrindeki askerler de öyle. Dudağını ısırarak sana bakıyor. Uzayıp giden sessizlikte, Zarkov'un düşüncelerinin kafasında ağır ağır döndüğünü neredeyse duyabiliyorsun. Sonunda derin bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Beni kandırmaya çalışıyorsunuz, öyle mi? Lord Hazretleri'ne götürülmek mi istiyorsunuz? Olur. Usulüne uygun olarak!"

languages.text: {n}El sargento se detiene de inmediato, al igual que los soldados bajo su mando. Te observa, mordiéndose el labio. En el silencio prolongado, prácticamente puedes oír los pensamientos de Zarkov moverse con pesadez por su cabeza. Finalmente, suspira con fuerza.{/n} «Está intentando engañarme, ¿verdad? ¿Quiere ver a milord? Podemos concedérselo. ¡Siguiendo el procedimiento, claro!».
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

traits.locale_text: {n}El sargento se detiene de inmediato, al igual que los soldados bajo su mando. Te observa, mordiéndose el labio. En el silencio prolongado, prácticamente puedes oír los pensamientos de Zarkov moverse con pesadez por su cabeza. Finalmente, suspira con fuerza.{/n} «Está intentando engañarme, ¿verdad? ¿Quiere ver a milord? Podemos concedérselo. ¡Siguiendo el procedimiento, claro!».

languages.text: {n}Der Sergeant steht instinktiv stramm wie die Soldaten unter seinem Kommando. Er starrt dich an und kaut auf seiner Lippe. In der nun folgenden Stille kannst du die Gedanken förmlich hören, die Zarkov durch den Kopf gehen. Schließlich stößt er ein lautes Seufzen aus.{/n} "Ihr wollt mich reinlegen, oder? Ich soll Euch zu Seiner Lorschaft bringen? Das lässt sich einrichten. Wie es sich gehört!"
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Sergeant steht instinktiv stramm wie die Soldaten unter seinem Kommando. Er starrt dich an und kaut auf seiner Lippe. In der nun folgenden Stille kannst du die Gedanken förmlich hören, die Zarkov durch den Kopf gehen. Schließlich stößt er ein lautes Seufzen aus.{/n} "Ihr wollt mich reinlegen, oder? Ich soll Euch zu Seiner Lorschaft bringen? Das lässt sich einrichten. Wie es sich gehört!"

languages.text: {n}軍曹は本能的に凍りつき、指揮下の兵士たちもそれにならう。彼は唇を噛みながら君を見つめる。引き伸ばされる沈黙の中、ザルコフの思考が頭の中で重々しく巡る音さえ、君には聞こえそうだ。ついに、彼は大きくため息をつく。{/n}「俺をだますつもりか？閣下のもとへ連れていけと？いいだろう、手配してやる。しかるべきやり方でな！」
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant freezes instinctively, as do the soldiers under his command. He stares at you, biting his lip. In the stretching silence, you can practically hear Zarkov's thoughts turning heavily in his head. At last, he breathes a loud sigh.{/n} "Trying to trick me, are you? You want to be taken to His Lordship? That can be arranged. In the proper fashion!"

traits.locale_text: {n}軍曹は本能的に凍りつき、指揮下の兵士たちもそれにならう。彼は唇を噛みながら君を見つめる。引き伸ばされる沈黙の中、ザルコフの思考が頭の中で重々しく巡る音さえ、君には聞こえそうだ。ついに、彼は大きくため息をつく。{/n}「俺をだますつもりか？閣下のもとへ連れていけと？いいだろう、手配してやる。しかるべきやり方でな！」
